_meta.title: NOVIQ Engine — Complete Medical Logic Knowledge Base v3
source_documents: Book1.xlsx (General Surgery — Arabic logic + English keywords)

general_surgery.coding_hint: LN Integrity: يجب مطابقة عدد العقد في تقرير العمليات مع تقرير الباثولوجي.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Safety Gate: إصدار تنبيه فوراً إذا لم تذكر كلمة "RLN" أو "Parathyroid".

general_surgery.coding_hint: The 12-Hr Rule: للأطفال (10-14 سنة) الجراحة ضرورية في < 12 ساعة لمنع الانفجار.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Age-Risk Clock: تنبيه تأخير الجراحة للأطفال. كشف الـ Upcoding في المنظار (Cross-check Staplers).

general_surgery.coding_hint: تستخدم عند التواء الزائدة (Kinked) وامتداد العدوى للقولون الصاعد والـ Jejunum.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Extension Logic: السماح بالتكويد المعقد فقط عند ثبوت الـ Perforation الممتد في الباثولوجي.

general_surgery.coding_hint: Small Stone Paradox: الحصوات الصغيرة (Microlithiasis) أخطر من الكبيرة لتسببها في انسداد الـ CBD.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Adhesiolysis Guard: رفض كود الالتصاقات إلا في حالة وجود جراحات سابقة (Past history like CS).

general_surgery.coding_hint: Congenital Shield: يرفض التأمين الفتق الإربي للشباب إلا إذا وثقت كحالة طارئة (Strangulated).
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Emergency Loophole: المحرك يبحث عن "Cord Obstruction" أو "Tear" لتمرير المطالبة تأمينياً.

general_surgery.coding_hint: Defect Logic: الشبكة (Mesh 15x15) ضرورية وظيفياً للـ Defect الكبير ولا تعتبر تجميلاً.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Cosmetic Filter: عزل الـ Abdominoplasty كإجراء تجميلي غير مغطى (90% Rejection).

general_surgery.coding_hint: Grade Gate: تغطية الدرجة 3 و4 فقط. الـ Harmonic غير مبرر طبياً للبواسير.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Technology Guard: رفض كود الـ Laser في 70% من البوالص وتنبيه الـ Upcoding للـ Harmonic.

general_surgery.coding_hint: Sphincter Gate: الحالات الـ High تخترق الـ Internal sphincter وتتطلب 2-3 جلسات.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Complexity Trigger: وجود خيط الـ "Seton" يرفع تصنيف الحالة تلقائياً ويبرر تعدد العمليات.

general_surgery.coding_hint: Stoma Protocol: في الحالات الصعبة يتم عمل "فتحة جانبية" (Stoma) ثم غلقها لاحقاً (كودين منفصلين).
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Integrity Gate: منع المطالبة المالية بدون تقرير باثولوجي يثبت الـ Tumor والـ Safety margins.

general_surgery.coding_hint: أعلى فئة تكويد (Special Char). مخصصة لحالات سرطان رأس البنكرياس.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Max Tier Trigger: كلمات مثل "Duodenojejunostomy" تفعل أعلى تعويض مالي للمطالبة.

skin_lesion.six_s_rule: ALL skin lesions: 6S Rule mandatory — Site, Size, Shape, Surface, Consistency, Specimen
skin_lesion.size_gate: Coding strictly tied to maximum diameter of excised lesion — cross-match OT Notes vs Pathology
skin_lesion.wle_gate: Wide Local Excision justified ONLY by suspected/confirmed malignancy. Must mention Safety Margins + Specimen Orientation
skin_lesion.upcoding_guard: Flag WLE billed for benign Lipoma without malignancy evidence → downgrade to Simple Excision
skin_lesion.fwa_alert: Flag Large Excision >5cm if pre-op Radiology shows smaller mass

thyroid.evidence_hierarchy: OT Notes > Pathology > Radiology > Admission Notes — engine must enforce this order
thyroid.fna_gate: FNA = diagnostic gateway. Must correlate with TIRADS 3-5
thyroid.lobectomy_gate: Thyroid Lobectomy justified by Focal Lesion on one lobe via T99 Scan (Hot/Cold Nodule). Must document Isthmus division + unilateral RLN identification
thyroid.total_tt_gate: Total TT = bilateral disease or high-risk TIRADS. Must document bilateral RLN identification + Parathyroid preservation
thyroid.ln_integrity_gate: LN Dissection: match node count in OT Notes vs Histopathology log. Trigger TIRADS 4/5 or FNA positive for malignancy
thyroid.upcoding_alert: Flag LN Dissection billed for TIRADS 2 (Benign Hyperplasia) without clinical evidence
thyroid.safety_net: If Stridor documented → engine expects ICU Admission or Emergency Re-exploration
thyroid.rln_trigger: Issue immediate alert if RLN or Parathyroid not mentioned in TT operative notes
thyroid.specimen_matcher: Containers sent to lab must match surgical description — prevent phantom specimen billing

appendicitis.pediatric_12hr_rule: Children 10-14 yrs: surgery within 12h mandatory — life-saving/critical. Rapid perforation risk due to inability of omentum to localize
appendicitis.open_vs_lap: Open = pediatric gold standard / perforation cases (superior peritoneal lavage). Laparoscopic = adult non-complicated standard
appendicitis.robotic_reject: Robotic Appendectomy: FLAG/REJECT — not FDA agreed for appendectomy. Auto-downgrade to Laparoscopic/Open (95% rejection rate globally)
appendicitis.right_hemi_gate: Right Hemicolectomy only if infection kinked + gangrene/perforation involving cecum/colon confirmed in OT notes + Histopathology
appendicitis.consumables_audit: Cross-match Trocars/Staplers in consumables list to prevent Open→Lap upcoding
appendicitis.sepsis_watch: High WBC/CRP + Hypotension → upgrade to Critical Care/ICU Logic

cholecystectomy.small_stone_paradox: Microlithiasis (small stones) more dangerous than large stones — causes Common Bile Duct complications. Flag for documentation
cholecystectomy.adhesiolysis_guard: Reject Adhesiolysis code unless past surgical history documented (e.g. previous laparotomy)
cholecystectomy.cvor_documentation: CVOS (Critical View of Safety), Cystic duct identification mandatory in operative notes
cholecystectomy.robotic_watch: Robotic Cholecystectomy = special character — verify clinical justification vs laparoscopic approach

hernia.inguinal_young: Young patients: Insurance rejects inguinal hernia UNLESS documented as emergency (Strangulated, Cord Obstruction, or Tear)
hernia.emergency_loophole: Engine searches for 'Cord Obstruction' or 'Tear' to pass claim for young patient hernia
hernia.mesh_logic: Mesh (15x15) is medically necessary for large defects — not cosmetic. Document Defect Size
hernia.abdominoplasty_filter: Abdominoplasty = cosmetic, 90% rejection. Only covered when concurrent with hernia repair (umbilical/incisional)
hernia.diastasis_watch: Diastasis Recti + Abdominoplasty = flag for cosmetic exclusion unless hernia ICD code present

colorectal.hemorrhoid_grade_gate: Hemorrhoidectomy coverage: Grade 3 and 4 ONLY. Laser not medically justified for hemorrhoids — flag upcoding
colorectal.harmonic_reject: Harmonic device billing for hemorrhoids = not medically justified → flag
colorectal.technology_guard: Reject Laser code in 70% of insurance policies — alert upcoding for Harmonic
colorectal.fistula_sphincter: High Fistula cases penetrate Internal Sphincter → require 2-3 sessions. Seton placement raises complexity classification
colorectal.colectomy_stoma: In difficult cases: Stoma (side opening) created first, closed later — must document both
colorectal.pathology_gate: Block colectomy financial claim without Pathology Report confirming Tumor + Safety Margins

oncology.whipple_max_tier: Whipple = highest coding tier (ultra_complex). Keywords 'Duodenojejunostomy' activate maximum financial tier
oncology.curative_vs_palliative: Engine must distinguish curative vs palliative intent for Whipple/Gastrojejunostomy — coding differs significantly
oncology.tumor_location: Must verify tumor location: Pancreas head/tail, Gallbladder, Duodenum

soft_tissue.ganglion_gate: Ganglion Cyst: NOT cosmetic. Must document Pain, Inflammation, or Tendon Friction especially near joints
soft_tissue.six_s_rule: 6S Rule mandatory for all cysts: Site, Size, Shape, Surface, Consistency, Surroundings
soft_tissue.fb_depth_gate: Foreign Body: Superficial = simple removal. Deep (below fascia) = OR + C-Arm. Document 'Radio-opaque' or 'Deep to Fascia'

nerve_decompression.cts_ncv_gate: Carpal Tunnel surgery NOT approved without positive NCV/EMG Test — Median/Ulnar nerve compression confirmed
nerve_decompression.trigger_finger_occupation: Trigger Finger: verify patient occupation — repetitive motion at work → flag for Workman's Compensation
nerve_decompression.functional_goal: Document Grip and Object Handling restoration as outcome

trauma.mode_of_injury_shield: CRITICAL: scan ER report for Fighting, Self-inflicted, Hazardous sports → immediate insurance rejection
trauma.tendon_timing_rule: Tendon repair >24h post-injury = high infection risk → Delayed Repair coding tier
trauma.tendon_graft_gate: Tendon Grafting justified only if tissue loss documented in operative notes
trauma.nerve_rehab_gate: Nerve Repair must include post-op Rehabilitation Plan for sensory/motor recovery
trauma.amputation_demarcation: Amputation at Line of Demarcation (Dead vs Viable tissue) — must be documented

bone_fixation.scaphoid_gate: Wrist Arthroscopy primarily for Scaphoid Fractures where ORIF is technically difficult
bone_fixation.imaging_gate: Hand fractures: X-ray in 3 views mandatory — AP, Lateral, Oblique
bone_fixation.hardware_logic: K-Wire = standard. Plates & Screws ONLY for Comminuted/Complex fractures

emergency.compartment_gate: Compartment Syndrome: Localized swelling + Vascular obstruction = emergency. Document 'Tense compartment' or 'Absent pulses'
emergency.fasciotomy_tier: Fasciotomy = life-saving/limb-saving emergency — highest urgency classification

bmi_gate.rule: Sleeve Gastrectomy covered ONLY if BMI > 40 (Morbid Obesity). ALL other weight-loss procedures = cosmetic by default
bmi_gate.calculation: BMI = Weight(kg) / [Height(m)]^2 — engine must AUTO-CALCULATE, never accept manual entry
bmi_gate.rejection: BMI ≤ 40 → REJECT as cosmetic weight-loss procedure

bypass_cosmetic.rule: Gastric Bypass, Mini Gastric Bypass, Lap Band = NOT COVERED — cosmetic by default
bypass_cosmetic.action: AUTO_REJECT unless BMI > 40 AND morbid obesity complications documented

revisional_protocol.rule: All revisional procedures require primary surgery documentation + prior BMI + indication for revision

leak_repair.rule: Bariatric Leak Repair = Common Complication NOT malpractice
leak_repair.methylene_blue_gate: Check Methylene Blue Test documentation in operative findings — key quality indicator
leak_repair.action: FLAG if Methylene Blue Test absent

adhesiolysis.rule: Covered as standalone ONLY when linked to Laparotomy or Repeated C-Sections (≥3)
adhesiolysis.action: APPROVE if linked — REJECT as standalone

hernia_reflux.rule: Ventral Hernia, Hiatal Hernia, Fundoplication = HIGH RISK → Senior Medical Review
hernia_reflux.diagnostic_trap: Hiatus hernia often misdiagnosed as GERD or Peptic Ulcer → flag for senior review

whipple_oncology.rule: Whipple/Gastrojejunostomy = highly complex oncology. Distinguish curative vs palliative intent

reduction_gate.rule: Breast Reduction = cosmetic by default. Covered ONLY if chronic back pain or thoracic/lumbar OA ICD code linked
reduction_gate.action: FLAG_REJECTION_RISK if no spinal ICD code present

oncology_protocol.rule: All malignant breast: Wide Local Excision WITH Safety Margin + LN Excision mandatory
oncology_protocol.action: FLAG if Safety Margin or LN Excision absent from operative findings

emergency_abscess.rule: Breast Abscess = Emergency — AUTO_APPROVE, bypass pre-auth
emergency_abscess.lactational_mastitis: Lactational Mastitis = medical condition, fully covered, NOT subject to maternity sub-limits
emergency_abscess.urgent_6_rule: Priority emergency abscesses: Breast + Brain (2B), Lung + Liver (2L), Gluteal (G)

cosmetic_exclusions.rule: Breast Augmentation, Mastopexy = strict cosmetic exclusions

free_flap.rule: Breast Reconstruction Free Flap = complexity 9. Microvascular anastomosis must be documented
free_flap.action: FLAG if anastomosis technique absent from operative notes

skin_graft.rule: STSG/FTSG generally covered. Exclusion check: extreme sports, war, self-inflicted injury
skin_graft.los_benchmark: Standard LOS = 1 day. First dressing change Day 5 — outpatient follow-up if stable

free_flap.rule: Microvascular Free Flap = complexity 9 — anastomosis documentation mandatory
free_flap.action: FLAG if anastomosis absent from operative notes

abdominoplasty.rule: Abdominoplasty = cosmetic by default. Covered ONLY concurrent with hernia repair
abdominoplasty.umbilical_coding: Umbilical Reconstruction = additional procedure — reflects true surgical skill
abdominoplasty.action: REJECT unless hernia ICD code present. FLAG umbilical as add-on code

cosmetic_exclusions.rule: Liposuction, Tissue Expanders = cosmetic exclusions. Scar Revision only inside repeated C-section billing. Keloid Excision needs functional impairment proof
cosmetic_exclusions.gynecomastia: Gynecomastia = cosmetic — check for lipoma tissue under nipple for any coverage

fracture_fixation.plate_rule: Plates & Screws (ORIF) = articular/peri-articular fractures near joints ONLY
fracture_fixation.im_nail_rule: IM Nailing = long bone shaft fractures (Femur, Humerus, Tibia) ONLY
fracture_fixation.fat_embolism_alert: CRITICAL: Fat Embolism = high-risk specific complication in Femur nailing — monitor
fracture_fixation.external_fixator: External Fixator = damage control for open/contaminated fractures
fracture_fixation.hardware_removal: Hardware removal decision based on X-ray healing status
fracture_fixation.action: HARDWARE_AUDITOR: verify fixation method matches fracture type

trauma_exclusion.rule: Verify Mode of Trauma and Incident Cause for ALL fracture cases
trauma_exclusion.exclusion_check: Non-covered: professional sports, criminal acts, hazardous activities
trauma_exclusion.action: EXCLUSION_HUNTER active for all trauma/fracture cases

hip_age_gate.rule: DHS = first choice for YOUNGER patients without AVN. Hip Replacement = preferred for ELDERLY
hip_age_gate.avn_check: Check for Avascular Necrosis (AVN) — changes DHS to replacement
hip_age_gate.hemiarthroplasty: Hemiarthroplasty = elderly + femoral neck fracture (emergency status)
hip_age_gate.action: AGE_GATE: elderly + hip fracture → recommend Hemiarthroplasty/THR over DHS

knee_mri_gate.rule: Knee Arthroscopy requires MRI Grade 3 or 4 OA, degenerative tears, or patellar instability
knee_mri_gate.age_protocol_elderly: Elderly: conservative first (Medical + Physio + Steroid/Hyaluronic) — surgery as LAST RESORT
knee_mri_gate.prp_rejection: PRP/Plasma injections = AUTO_REJECT — not FDA approved, classified as trial
knee_mri_gate.tkr_preexisting: TKR frequently flagged as Pre-existing condition — watch for this flag
knee_mri_gate.tkr_imaging: TKR requires AP X-ray showing aggressive OA
knee_mri_gate.action: FLAG if MRI absent. AUTO_REJECT PRP. FLAG TKR for pre-existing check

shoulder.rule: Shoulder decompression often flagged as Upcoding — engine defends based on surgical standards

spine.rule: Spinal Fusion requires MRI + failed conservative management history
spine.complexity_levels: Complexity by number of levels: 1-level vs 3-level — more levels = higher complexity
spine.discectomy: Discectomy = lumbar disc herniation with nerve compression
spine.action: FLAG if MRI absent or conservative management history not documented

congenital_exclusions.rule: Scoliosis and Flatfoot = CONGENITAL — strictly non-covered

exclusion_hunter.description: Scan ER/admission notes for policy exclusion keywords

bmi_calculator.description: Auto-calculate BMI for bariatric coverage gate
bmi_calculator.action: REJECT if BMI ≤ 40 for weight-loss procedures

cosmetic_filter.description: Flag cosmetic procedures submitted as medical

mri_gate.description: Knee arthroscopy and spinal surgery require MRI confirmation

age_gate.description: Hip fracture — DHS for young, replacement for elderly

prp_rejector.description: PRP injections are not FDA approved

methylene_blue_checker.description: Bariatric leak repair must document Methylene Blue Test
methylene_blue_checker.action: FLAG if Methylene Blue Test absent

ncv_matcher.description: Carpal Tunnel surgery requires positive NCV/EMG

oncologic_margin_checker.description: Breast oncology requires safety margin + LN excision
oncologic_margin_checker.action: FLAG if Safety Margin or LN Excision absent

hardware_auditor.description: Fixation method must match fracture type

robotic_rejector.description: Robotic Appendectomy not FDA approved for this indication

rln_safety_alert.description: Total Thyroidectomy must document bilateral RLN and Parathyroid
rln_safety_alert.action: ALERT if RLN or Parathyroid not mentioned in operative notes

senior_review_flag.description: Complex or misdiagnosis-prone cases require senior medical review

specimen_matcher.description: Lab container count must match surgical description
specimen_matcher.action: FLAG if specimen count mismatch between OT Notes and Pathology

occupational_alert.description: Trigger Finger in manual labor worker — potential Workman's Compensation

timing_checker.rule: Tendon repair >24h post-injury = Delayed Repair coding tier

imaging_gates.thyroid: TIRADS score + TSH/T3/T4 + T99 Nuclear Scan
imaging_gates.appendicitis: US abdomen or CT scan + WBC/CRP for severity
imaging_gates.cholecystectomy: US abdomen mandatory — HIDA scan if needed
